name: Feltz Street Park
description: Feltz Street Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Perryville, MO. There is 1 outdoor hard court. This is a dedicated court with a permanent net and lines. The court is free.

name: Perry Park Center
description: Perry Park Center is a place to play pickleball in Perryville, MO. There are 3 indoor concrete courts. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. Players have access to locker rooms, restrooms, water, lights, wheelchair accessibility, and food.
